final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial street portrait of a young woman in 1990s 香港 at night (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "复古胶片" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 1990s 香港 cinema visual language (王家卫《重庆森林》era), Nan Goldin intimate analog street photography, 1990s Japanese city pop album cover art; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include the young woman leaning against a neon sign as the anchored pose
Subject: must include a young woman wearing a denim jacket, leaning against a neon sign
Scene/backdrop: must include 1990s 香港 street at night with neon signage environment
Lighting/mood: needs a hazy nocturnal atmosphere with cinematic grain and nostalgic mood — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm-toned direction — exact hue ratios and grain overlay are yours
Materials/textures: needs a film-grain, analog texture treatment — exact grain level and halation is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
